name: Jeritza
description:
Jeritza is a playable character from Fire Emblem: Three Houses and Fire Emblem Warriors: Three Hopes. He is a teacher at the Officers Academy who is in charge of armed combat training, and the tertiary antagonist of Cindered Shadows. He possesses a Minor Crest of Lamine and is 21 years old at the start of the game.

He might just be the Death Knight. Not sure though.

Oh well, deploy the Lysithea.
creator: Denki_The_Thunder_King27
